desc: Drone Log analyzer: A high-performance universal dashboard application for organizing and analyzing DJI/Litchi flight logs privately in one place. Supports plu…
descFull: Drone Log analyzer: A high-performance universal dashboard application for organizing and analyzing DJI/Litchi flight logs privately in one place. Supports plugin for custom flight log formats. Built with Tauri v2, DuckDB, and React.
